title: RBI (Urban Cooperative Banks – Resolution of Stressed Assets) Second Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
The RBI mandates a structured framework for resolving stressed loans caused by natural calamities with strict timelines. It ensures timely relief through standardized policies and borrower-centric measures.
The post RBI (Urban Cooperative Banks – Resolution of Stressed Assets) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
